author: Vinayak Gautham
object_id: PAT-001 through PAT-008, pattern-schema, pattern-registry, docs/pattern-matching
summary: Added Pattern Repository — a sibling to the Rule Repository. Eight filing patterns covering approximately 95% of individual filer profiles: PAT-001 (Salaried Single Employer), PAT-002 (Salary + Gig 44AD), PAT-003 (Salary + Capital Gains), PAT-004 (Multiple Employers), PAT-005 (NRI), PAT-006 (Pensioner), PAT-007 (Salary + Let-Out HP), PAT-008 (Professional 44ADA). Each pattern defines: profile signature for matching, typical evidence, ordered decisions, applicable rules, common validations, minimum intake questions, expected outcomes, and edge cases with escalation paths.
notes: Patterns reduce the number of questions Jarviz must ask from ~20 (full decision tree) to ≤5 (pattern confirmation). They do not replace the rule engine — they compress the entry point. Rule engine verdict always overrides pattern expectation.
